backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that defines an Inquiry type and exposes two functions: submitInquiry (validates and stores a new inquiry with timestamp) and getAllInquiries (returns all stored inquiries as an array).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that AboutSection.tsx was updated to replace the profile photo with the uploaded image saved at the generated asset path, with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, covering CSS, config, hooks, and all React components in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, primary, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the TypeScript module entry point src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles all page sections (Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, WhyChooseMe, Contact) along with Navigation, Footer, and a sticky WhatsApp button.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying Debraj Paul's profile photo from /assets/my portfolio image-1.jpg, bio text, skill tags, location badge, and a smooth-scroll CTA button to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact form component with validation for name, phone, business type, and message fields that submits data to the backend canister via the useSubmitInquiry hook, showing a success state on completion.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with brand info, contact links (phone, WhatsApp, email), smooth-scroll quick navigation links, a services list, and a dynamic copyright year with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with headline, subheadline, trust stats, and two CTAs (Get Free Demo scroll and WhatsApp link), featuring decorative background grid and glowing orbs.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a logo, desktop nav buttons, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/PortfolioSection: Portfolio grid displaying three sample demo projects (gym, lawyer, coaching) with images, tags, category badges, and a hover overlay linking to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Three-tier pricing section (Basic ₹2,500, Standard ₹3,500, Premium ₹5,000) with feature lists, a highlighted popular badge, and WhatsApp CTA buttons.
Services grid showcasing five offerings (website design, landing pages, redesign, WhatsApp integration, SEO) as icon cards, plus a custom-request CTA card.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating WhatsApp button in the bottom-right corner with a hover tooltip and pulse animation linking to a pre-filled WhatsApp chat.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseMeSecti: React component displaying a 'Why Choose Me' section with five benefit cards (48hr delivery, pricing, design, WhatsApp support, no hidden charges), each with a colored icon, description, and background number.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentity context and hook for ICP authentication, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and login status states.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitInquiry mutation hook that calls the backend's submitInquiry method and invalidates the inquiries query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file importing Google Fonts and Tailwind directives, defining dark-blue OKLCH CSS custom properties for theming, and utility classes for gradients, card glow, WhatsApp pulse animation, and nav blur.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom fonts (Inter/Poppins), box shadows, border radii, and animations including fade-up and float.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, and requirements — specifically recording the completed task of replacing the About section profile photo with a real portrait image.
